text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I've never felt a rush of emotions like this
before.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I feel as if a weight has dropped from my
shoulders. My chest feels light.
choice_data_list: I'm looking forward to seeing you run.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'll live up to your expectations. I need to prove
something today.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: To show that the Empress stands tall, even now!
